subprocess_isolation.warning: claude binary not on PATH; running in same-session degraded mode. Subagents will execute in the calling Gemini session rather than isolated subprocesses. Pipeline kernel hooks (role-gate, ship-gate, phase-gate-precondition) and Gemini-Forgery defenses (v7.9.0+ artifact content checks, git diff substance gate, state.json checksum) still apply.

budget_cap.warning: no native budget cap on Gemini CLI; consider EVOLVE_RUN_TIMEOUT for external bound

profile_permissions.warning: Gemini CLI has no profile-permission flags; subagents have access to whatever tools the calling Gemini session permits. Mitigation: anti-forgery prompt inoculation in SKILL.md and post-hoc artifact verification.

challenge_token.warning: challenge token verified post-hoc on artifact rather than embedded in subprocess profile

notes: Gemini CLI lacks non-interactive prompt mode, --max-budget-usd, and subagent dispatch primitives as of 2026-05. The HYBRID mode (when claude is on PATH) inherits all capabilities from claude.sh. The DEGRADED mode (no claude) runs the pipeline in same-session execution; structural safety is provided by pipeline-level kernel hooks rather than per-subagent isolation. See docs/incidents/gemini-forgery.md for the structural defenses that make degraded mode safe.
